scope: Ascend SparseAttnSharedkv public ABI verifier extension for route-split wrapper overhead timing
change_summary: Records active sparse shared-KV backend environment knobs in the verifier result.
Adds --time-legacy-abi to time public sparse_attn_sharedkv(...) against prebuilt concatenated-bank sparse_mla_shared_kv(...) on the same shape.
Reports public_minus_legacy_median_ms so wrapper/index/cat overhead is explicit for the next S4096 MI350 refresh.
why_it_matters: The Ascend SASG contract keeps original KV and compressed KV separate at the public boundary and returns d_ori_kv plus d_cmp_kv. The AMD backend currently routes that public ABI through a concatenated shared-KV bank. This verifier extension makes the overhead of that wrapper measurable before the next route-split kernel cut.

cpu_container_validation.read: CPU wall timing is only a smoke for the new reporting path; it is not performance evidence for MI350.

mi350_refresh_status.read: The follow-up S4096 BF16 MI350 refresh passed on a later free GPU slice with query_recompute and H64/N128. Public wrapper overhead over prebuilt concatenated-bank ABI was 0.189 ms CUDA-event median.
mi350_refresh_status.initial_defer_reason: All MI350 GPUs were occupied by active external containers during the first attempt.

next_mi350_command.purpose: Refresh S4096 BF16 public Ascend ABI route-split timing with wrapper-overhead A/B under the current safe scatter default.
next_mi350_command.run_command: ssh do-sonle5-mi350-gpu "docker run --rm --network=host --ipc=host --device=/dev/kfd --device=/dev/dri --group-add video --volume /scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527:/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 --env HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 --env PYTHONPATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/sources/wip/torchtitan --env TORCHTITAN_DSV4_SPARSE_MLA_SHAREDKV_SCATTER_MODE=auto --entrypoint /bin/bash onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori -lc 'cd /scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 && mkdir -p run_artifacts && python3 tools/dsv4_runtime_probe/verify_sparse_attn_sharedkv_ascend_abi.py --backend-path sources/wip/torchtitan/torchtitan/models/deepseek_v4/sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend.py --device cuda --dtype bf16 --seq-len 4096 --heads 64 --dim 512 --local-count 128 --topk 512 --compress-ratio 4 --check-backward --warmup-iters 1 --timed-iters 3 --time-legacy-abi --summary-path run_artifacts/sparse_attn_sharedkv_ascend_abi_s4096_route_overhead_safeauto_20260602.json --json'"

promotion_read: This is a verifier and measurement-surface improvement. It does not close the fused sparse MLA/LI backward gap by itself; it prepares the next route-split S4096 MI350 benchmark needed before replacing the concatenated-bank bridge with a production route-split SASG-style kernel.
